primaryEditFields.label: Layer Thickness (μm)
primaryEditFields.description: Thickness of each printed layer. Lower values increase detail but add print time.

primaryEditFields.label: Burn-In Layer Cure Time (s)
primaryEditFields.description: Exposure time used for the first burn-in layers to ensure plate adhesion.

primaryEditFields.label: Burn-In Layer Count
primaryEditFields.description: How many initial layers use burn-in exposure settings.

primaryEditFields.label: Transitional Layers
primaryEditFields.description: Number of blend layers between burn-in and normal exposure.

primaryEditFields.label: UV-LED PWM Value (%)
primaryEditFields.description: Relative UV power level. Lower values reduce intensity and can require longer exposure.

primaryEditFields.label: Bottom Wait Before Print (s)
primaryEditFields.description: Pause before exposing burn-in layers, useful for resin settling.

primaryEditFields.label: Bottom Wait After Print (s)
primaryEditFields.description: Pause after burn-in exposure and before movement.

primaryEditFields.label: Bottom Wait After Lift (s)
primaryEditFields.description: Pause after lifting burn-in layers and before the next step.

primaryEditFields.label: Bottom Lift Distance (mm)
primaryEditFields.description: Lift height used for burn-in layers after exposure.

primaryEditFields.label: Normal Layer Cure Time (s)
primaryEditFields.description: Exposure time used for standard (non burn-in) layers.

primaryEditFields.label: Wait After Print (s)
primaryEditFields.description: Pause after normal exposure and before lift/retract.

primaryEditFields.label: Wait After Lift (s)
primaryEditFields.description: Pause after normal lift movement and before next layer.

primaryEditFields.label: Normal Lift Distance (mm)
primaryEditFields.description: Lift height used for normal layers after exposure.
